prompt: The JFrame appears but the button is not visible. What is the bug?
choices: JButton cannot be added to a JFrame directly — use a JPanel
setVisible(true) is called before the button is added; the layout is not revalidated afterward, so the button is not rendered
setSize must be called after add() to include the button's dimensions
JButton requires an ActionListener before it can be displayed
explanation: setVisible(true) renders the frame with its current components. Adding components afterward does not automatically trigger a re-layout and repaint. Fix: add all components before calling setVisible(true), or call frame.revalidate(); frame.repaint(); after adding the button.
